TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Olaw ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Hamicho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 125 buwan, 397 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 85% kyan ku 339 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 15% kyan ku 58 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 83%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Olawhya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Olaw hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Olaw hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Olaw hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Olaw hya' ga Lacihakan. tay 'zil na Olaw hya' ga Langas. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ olaw ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ħamiʦ~ʨħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na olawħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj ʔzil na olaw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na olaw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na olaw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na olaw ħjaʔ ɣa laʦ~ʨiħakan. taj ʔzil na olaw ħjaʔ ɣa laŋas~ɕ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Olaw ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Hamicho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 125 buwan, 397 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 85% kyan ku 339 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 15% kyan ku 58 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 83%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Olawhya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Olaw hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Olaw hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Olaw hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Olaw hya' ga Lacihakan. tay 'zil na Olaw hya' ga Langas. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ olaw ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ħamiʦ~ʨħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na olawħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj ʔzil na olaw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na olaw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na olaw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na olaw ħjaʔ ɣa laʦ~ʨiħakan. taj ʔzil na olaw ħjaʔ ɣa laŋas~ɕ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
